LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONERS CALIFORNIA-NEVADA ANNUAL CONFERENCE OF THE UNITED METHODIST CHURCH AND PACIFIC POLK PROPERTIES, LLC'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED. THE PROPERTY AS IT STANDS IS NON-COMMERCIAL CHURCH PROPERTY AND THE CITY'S RESOLUTION IS CONTRARY TO LAW. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TO SUBMIT OBJECTIONS TO THE PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT NO LATER THAN MAY 16, 2008. PETITIONERS' REPLY IS DUE ON OR BEFORE MAY 23, 2008. PETITIONERS' REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 23, 2008, AND DEEMED SUBMITTED ON THAT DAY. JUDGE: PETER J. ATTY. THOMAS S. LAKRITZ (TEL. 554-6547) AND ATTY. MARLENA G. BYRNE (TEL. 554-4620) OF THE CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE FOR RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: A R G U E D. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS CALIFORNIA-NEVADA ANNUAL CONFERENCE OF THE UNITED METHODIST CHURCH AND PACIFIC POLK PROPERTIES, LLC'S MOTION For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate IS GRANTED. THE PROPERTY AS IT STANDS IS NON-COMMERCIAL CHURCH PROPERTY AND THE CITY'S RESOLUTION IS CONTRARY TO LAW. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TO SUBMIT OBJECTIONS TO THE PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT NO LATER THAN MAY 16, 2008. PETITIONERS' REPLY IS DUE ON OR BEFORE MAY 23, 2008. PETITIONERS' REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 23, 2008, AND DEEMED SUBMITTED ON THAT DAY. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/LB)
